title: Fix static initialization order for packages with class hierarchies

features.name: cross-package static class method with side effects
features.description: Code should include a static class method that modifies a package-level variable, where the class is defined in one package and called during static initialization of another package that imports the first package

features.name: package import triggers static initialization order
features.description: Code should include two packages where one imports the other with wildcard import, and the importing package has static initialization that triggers a static method in the imported package
